---
title: "Modern Broods, or, Developments Unlooked For. "
---

## Modern Broods, or, Developments Unlooked For. 

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1900
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

This includes characters from <i>The Castle Builders,</i> <i>The Daisy Chain, The Stokesley Secret, Hopes and Fears, The Pillars of the House, The Two Sides of the Shield, Beechcroft at Rockstone, The Long Vacation </i>and<i> </i>‘Come to her Kingdom’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
